name: IMA Studio Music Generation
tagline: Text-to-music with Suno and DouBao models via IMA Open API.
description: AI music generation for text_to_music tasks with Suno (sonic), DouBao BGM (GenBGM), and DouBao Song (GenSong). Requires IMA_API_KEY. Uses only api.imastudio.com and runs standalone.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required at runtime via IMA_API_KEY environment variable. It is sent only to api.imastudio.com for authentication and task APIs.

requires.credentialNote: IMA_API_KEY is required at runtime and sent only to api.imastudio.com.

localPaths.purpose: No local preference/log files are required by this skill script.

persistence.retention: No local preference/log persistence by default.
